currentLinkedIn.headline: Senior Product Designer at Veloci · Stockholm | Mobile · Research · Design Systems
currentLinkedIn.about: I design mobile experiences that get out of the way. Seven years of user research, rapid prototyping, and cross-functional collaboration — mostly in consumer apps with millions of users.

experience.title: Senior Product Designer
bullets: Led end-to-end redesign of the onboarding flow; usability testing cut task-completion errors by 55%
Established and maintained a Figma component library used by six product squads across two platforms
Ran 80+ moderated research sessions per year to inform roadmap priorities and validate concepts

experience.title: UX Designer
bullets: Designed the map and booking interface for a micro-mobility app with 500K active users
Introduced usability heuristic reviews as a standing ritual; reduced post-launch UX bugs by 30%
